name: IN-SPACe (Indian National Space Promotion and Authorisation Centre)

overview.value: IN-SPACe (Indian National Space Promotion and Authorisation Centre) is an autonomous and single window nodal agency in the Department of Space for the promotion, encouragement and regulation of space activities of both government and private entities. It also facilitates the usage of ISRO facilities by private entities. The establishment of IN-SPACe was announced in June 2020.

focus.value: Autonomous, single-window nodal agency in the Department of Space for the promotion, encouragement and regulation of space activities of both government and private entities

status.value: autonomous nodal agency, Department of Space, Government of India

notes: Added 2026-07-08 per Florian (anti-spoof option B: registry-recorded website gives IN-SPACe pages an official_record path). inspace.gov.in is a JS shell with no server-rendered text (known since the LVM3 item, SWEEP_MEMORY 2026-07-08-F2); facts sourced from pib.gov.in and isro.gov.in/IN-SPACe.html instead. Headquarters Bopal, Ahmedabad, Gujarat; no headquarters field on OrgProfile.
